note: Desired and observed DNS state for docs (ADR-002). Cloudflare is authoritative; Plesk is the origin hosting provider, not the DNS provider. This file is SSOT for verify ladder expectations.

records.comment: Plesk public IPv4 (same as subactor.com / prototypowanie.pl panel host). Confirmed 2026-07-18 via dig A subactor.com.

observed_public.interpretation: Cloudflare authoritative DNS points directly to the Plesk origin. Cutover is public; future changes must go through the provider-aware connector and produce a receipt.

observed_origin.https_root: 200 Subactor Docs index.html (formal release, not probe)
observed_origin.origin_tls: Let's Encrypt CN=docs.subactor.com SAN=docs.subactor.com (YR1); publicly trusted via curl --resolve
observed_origin.interpretation: Origin content + marker + LE domain-only cert ready. Public DNS still Pages — do not flip until explicit approval.

docs.subactor.com.observed_note: Public docs.subactor.com resolves to the Plesk origin through Cloudflare authoritative DNS. Connector control still requires the scoped Cloudflare vault profile.

staging.purpose: Recommended origin/public rehearsal path before production cutover.

observed_public.interpretation: Public DNS already on Plesk origin with LE; content marker missing — not a completed publish DoD.

staging.blocker: Upload rehearsal release + marker to docs-stage docroot (same gates as docs); then public fingerprint can pass on stage.

dns_emergency.note: HITL only; restores Pages, not previous Plesk release. TLS SAN still wrong for docs.subactor.com.

content.note: Content rollback available after a previous release exists; first formal release has no previous yet.

dns_provider.blocker: Cloudflare API token and zone_id are not yet present in the platform vault, so Subactor can observe authority/propagation but cannot issue a provider API receipt for future changes.

needs_human: Provide a scoped Cloudflare API token with Zone DNS Edit and Zone Read plus the subactor.com zone_id through one-time secret intake.
Keep all future boundary DNS changes on the provider-aware dry-run → exact plan_hash → one-time apply grant path.
subscription_rights_note: Customer subactor_customer on webspace subactor.com: manage_subdomains=true, create_domains=true, max_subdom=-1. Connector subdomain-ensure wired. LE XML ApiRpc not implemented; certificate get-pool denied for subscription.
